explanation: The scenario does not explicitly require separate account boundaries or organization-policy targeting. One member account with tagged resources could therefore meet the literal baseline-separation wording through identity and resource controls, while the explanation incorrectly rejects the option because OUs group accounts even though the option does not claim to use OUs.
required_action: State that production, development, and regulated workloads require separate account boundaries for isolation and ownership, and that organization-level baselines must target account groups; then realign option D, rationales, matrix, and explanation.

supporting_source.locator: Organize based on security and operational needs
supporting_source.title: Design principles for your multi-account strategy
